title: Global EV sales hit 2 million in June – and the US falls further behind
summary: Global EV sales topped 2 million in June, but the headline numbers hide a widening split between the world’s biggest markets.

title: Hyundai launches affordable EV deals with 0% APR and up to $10,000 off
summary: Hyundai’s biggest sales promo of the year, the Getaway Summer Sales Event, kicked off this month with competitive offers on its most popular vehicles, including EVs.

title: SolarEdge says its new ‘Lego-like’ home battery installs in under 30 minutes
summary: SolarEdge is rolling out its next-generation home solar and battery storage platform across the US, with orders for SolarEdge Nexis now open.

title: China’s giant Gobi solar plant runs after dark on salt, not batteries
summary:
China Three Gorges Corporation (CTG) has put the world’s largest solar PV-plus-concentrated-solar hybrid into commercial trial operation in the Gobi Desert — and its headline trick is delivering power after sunset without a single lithium battery.

The 1-gigawatt Hami project in Xinjiang stores the sun’s energy as heat in molten salt, letting it keep generating for up to eight hours after dark.

title: Trump clean energy rollbacks erase $68B in US investment
summary: The Trump administration’s rollback of clean energy policies has now cost the US nearly 470,000 jobs and $68 billion in private investment, according to a new report released today.

title: BYD launches the Dolphin G plug-in hatch with 65 miles of EV range for $32,000
summary: The Dolphin G DM-i is BYD’s first car specifically designed for Europe. With up to 65 miles of pure electric range and 646 miles combined, BYD said the plug-in hatch will redefine the segment as an affordable, efficient alternative. It’s now available to order, starting at about $32,000.

title: Toyota delays Highlander BEV production as the 3-row electric SUV is put on the back burner
summary: Toyota is delaying production of its first three-row electric SUV, the 2027 Highlander BEV, as it extends the current gas and hybrid models.

title: EcoFlow 3,072Wh DELTA 3 Ultra power station $1,299 in Outdoor Season Sale, Velotric Discover 2 e-bike $1,799, more
summary:
We’ve stuffed today’s Green Deals with plenty of summer savings, starting with EcoFlow’s Outdoor Season Sale and up to 57% power station discounts from $259, like the 3,072Wh DELTA 3 Ultra Portable Power Station down at $1,299. As part of Velotric’s World Cup Sale deals, you can find the Discover 2 Step-Thru Comfort Commuter e-bike with Apple Find My, SensorSwap tech, and a 75-mile range down at its second-lowest $1,799 pricing. We also spotted the affordable yet advanced Worx 40V 17-inch 2-in-1 Cordless Electric Intellicut Lawn Mower with 2x batteries at $230, as well as Schumacher’s NACS to J1772 EV charging adapter at a new $47.50 low, and much more waiting for you below. As always, you can also find the latest hangover deals down at the bottom of the page, like yesterday’s Lectric XP4 750 e-bike cargo bundle flash sale that ends tonight, Navee’s Summer EV Sale, and more.

Head below for other New Green Deals we’ve found today and, of course, Electrek’s best EV buying and leasing deals. Also, check out the new Electrek Tesla Shop for the best deals on Tesla accessories.

title: MG is launching its first PHEV with semi-solid-state batteries in 2027
summary: MG’s semi-solid-state batteries will not be exclusive to EVs, with plans to launch three new plug-in hybrid SUVs equipped with the new battery tech. First up will be the MG ZS PHEV, set to go on sale in 2027.

title: New bill would ban Tesla’s camera-only Robotaxi, not Waymo
summary:
New Jersey lawmakers are advancing a bill that would require driverless commercial vehicles to carry cameras plus two additional sensor types — a mandate Tesla’s camera-only Robotaxi can’t meet.

The proposed law, S1677, would effectively lock Tesla out of the most densely populated US state unless it adds the radar and lidar hardware that Elon Musk has spent years insisting his cars don’t need.

title: Feds Are Looking to Remove a Major Roadblock for Driverless Robotaxis: The Steering Wheel
summary: The head of NHTSA wants to remove steering wheel requirements for cars that are only intended to be driverless.

title: New Jersey Law Would Outlaw Tesla's Camera-Based Robotaxi Tech
summary: A bill is headed for a vote in New Jersey that would force self-driving cars to use two additional technologies on top of cameras.

title: Mercedes EV Sales Jumped 50% In Q2. That's Mostly Thanks To Europe
summary: One out of every four Mercedes cars sold in Europe was fully electric. The rest of the world is nowhere near that level.

title: I Saw Scout's New Trucks Up Close. They Could Be Worth The Wait
summary: I caught Scout's electric Traveler and Terra in the wild. They have a lot to offer, but the company's road ahead is far from smooth.

title: Don't Get Too Rowdy In A Waymo, Kids, Or This Could Happen To You
summary: Two California teens thought they were taking a robotaxi home. Waymo quietly called the cops.

title: Toyota Delays 2027 Highlander EV As Demand For Gas Model Remains Robust
summary: The Highlander EV was supposed to arrive by the end of this year. It will now have a new launch timeline.

title: Ford’s $30,000 Electric Pickup's Size, Explained
summary: Ever since Ford announced its affordable electric pickup, it has referred to it as a mid-size model. A typo called that into question.

title: You Think Your Electric Lawnmower is Eco Friendly? Volkswagen Just Replaced Its Lawnmowers With Sheep
summary: Volkswagen replaced the mechanical lawnmowers at its factory in Poland with a flock of 100 sheep.

title: BYD's PHEV Pickup Just Landed In The U.K. But Americans Still Can't Have It
summary: The Shark pickup was already on sale in China, Mexico, South America, and Australia, leaving the U.S. as the odd one out.

title: The EU Wants To Use Satellites To Automatically Prevent Your Car From Speeding: Report
summary: If the satellite-based detection system realizes your car is speeding, regulators want it to automatically reduce your car's power output.
